description: Pins the shared key_id validation (with confirm) and the key update PUT body. The key_id case carries confirm:true because Go validates behind the confirm gate while Python validates ahead of it; they only agree once confirm is set.

cases.name: requires positive key_id
cases.expect_error: key_id is required and must be a positive integer

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This modifies access key permissions. Set confirm=true to proceed.
